I'm here to build tools
and eat bugs and I'm all outta bugs.

Creating beautiful, free, open source applications. Sometimes, they even work.

See My Projects GitHub

Projects

Tools I've released into the wild.

Scout

A quick and easy way to manage potential uploads to RED. Scan barcodes to look up physical releases (CDs, vinyls, etc) on Discogs, and check availability and request status.

Typescript React Native Expo
View on GitHub →

When I CBA.

About frog-tools

My name is froggo, and I'm an independent developer building open source software. I believe in freedom, privacy, and lovely-to-use, beautiful design.

If you enjoy my apps or find them useful, please consider donating to a local LGBTQ+ rights charity. Mermaids UK and The Trevor Project in the US do a lot of good work. 🏳️‍🌈

🌱

Open Source

All code is public and GPLv3-licensed. Fork it, modify it, free as in freedom.

🔒

Privacy First

No ads, no analytics, no tracking. Your data is yours.

🪶

Lightweight

Small, fast tools that do one thing and do it well.

Want to contribute?

I'm always happy to see new faces in the pond. Check out my repos, open an bug report (yum!), or submit a PR.

Jump to GitHub
